vocab.example: I’ve always been drawn to oil paintings because of the sheer depth and richness of the colors used.
I can spend hours in a gallery poring over the intricate details of a classical charcoal drawing.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không gian, cảm xúc)
vocab.example: Whenever I visit a museum, I like to just sit on a bench and soak up the creative atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: nhận ra, soi xét các chi tiết nhỏ
vocab.example: It's fascinating to try and pick out the hidden symbols that artists often embed within their masterpieces.

vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng với sự kinh ngạc
vocab.example: I truly marvel at the technical skill required to make a simple pencil sketch look so incredibly lifelike.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, quan sát kỹ để cảm nhận
vocab.example: I prefer quiet galleries where I can really take in the artwork without being distracted by large crowds.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên (hình ảnh, ký ức, cảm xúc)
vocab.example: Certain landscape paintings can conjure up vivid memories of my childhood trips to the countryside.
Looking back on my school days, visiting art exhibitions was always the highlight of my semester.
Sometimes I stumble upon local street art that is just as moving as the pieces found in prestigious museums.

vocab.meaning: dần dần khiến mình thích hơn
vocab.example: I didn't care for abstract art at first, but it has definitely started to grow on me over the years.
